description_short: Pomodoro timer with customizable intervals, session streaks, and focus statistics
description_full: Master your focus with the Pomodoro Technique. Work in focused bursts (default 25 minutes), then take short breaks (5 minutes). After 4 sessions, take a long break (15 minutes). Fully customizable intervals. Track your daily sessions, build streaks, and see your focus statistics over time. Local notifications remind you when breaks start and end. No account required, no internet needed, no ads ever.
features: Classic Pomodoro timer: 25min work / 5min break / 15min long break
Fully customizable intervals (work: 1-60min, short break: 1-30min, long break: 1-60min)
Session counter: shows current session number and progress toward long break
Daily streak tracking with calendar heat map
Statistics: total focus minutes today/week/month, sessions completed, longest streak
Local notifications when timer ends (works in background)
Focus sounds: optional ticking, white noise, or silent mode
Persistent timer: survives app backgrounding and reopening
Dark mode with OLED-optimized true black option

screens.name: TimerView
screens.description: Large circular timer at center. Session dots below showing progress toward long break. Start/Pause/Reset buttons. Current mode label (Focus / Short Break / Long Break).
components: Mode label above timer: FOCUS / SHORT BREAK / LONG BREAK
Session progress dots: ● ● ○ ○ (filled = completed, 4 dots default)

screens.name: StatsView
screens.description: Tab or swipe to access. Calendar heat map at top (GitHub contribution style). Stats cards below: today's sessions, this week, this month, all time. Streak counter.
components: Calendar heat map (90-day view, darker = more sessions)
Today card: sessions completed, total focus minutes
This week card: sessions, minutes, daily average
Current streak: consecutive days with at least 1 session

screens.name: SettingsView
screens.description: Configure all timer parameters. Presented as sheet from TimerView.
components: Sessions until long break stepper (1-10, default 4)
Sound picker: Silent / Tick / White Noise / Rain

color_scheme.background: System background (or true black if enabled)
color_scheme.streak_heat: Green ramp from light to dark based on session count

technical_notes.background_timer: Use a combination of Date-based calculation (store startTime and duration, compute remaining on foreground) and local notifications (schedule notification for timer end time). Do NOT use a background Timer — iOS will suspend it.
technical_notes.data_model: Session(id, date, type[focus/short/long], durationSeconds, completedAt). Query by date range for stats.
technical_notes.notifications: Schedule UNNotificationRequest with UNTimeIntervalNotificationTrigger for timer completion. Cancel and reschedule on pause/reset.

aso.title: Pomodoro Focus Timer
aso.subtitle: Study Timer & Focus Streaks
aso.keywords: pomodoro timer,focus timer,study timer,productivity timer,pomodoro technique,focus app,work timer,concentration,study focus,time management
aso.promotional_text: Build an unbreakable focus habit. Pomodoro timer with streaks, stats, and zero distractions.
